title: Registering the Honda Smart Key System

blocks.text: Registering the Honda Smart Key System
Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.

items: The latest HDS must be installed.
The date and time of the computer used in HDS must be correct.
Keep the computer as far away from the Honda Smart Key as possible.
The password obtained from MaRIS must be entered into HDS on the same day.
If electrical equipment other than Honda Genuine Parts is installed, the Honda Smart Key should be as far away as possible.
Doors must be closed during registration.

blocks.text: Select "One Push Start System" from the "System Selection Menu" of HDS, then select "Registration" from the "Test Mode Menu". Select "Registration" from the "Test Mode Menu". Select "PGM-FI ECU Replacement" from the "Registration Menu" of HDS, and then follow the on-screen instructions of HDS to proceed with the registration process. Ensure that the system is working properly after registration is complete.

HDS "Does the DLC cable have a 3-pin or 5-pin DLC adapter attached?" and select "NO". Check the "Is the HDS equipped with a one-push start system?" and select "YES". Operate the ENGINE START STOP switch according to the HDS display. Confirm "Ignition switch was not turned on" in HDS and press ENTER. Select "Registration" from the "Test Mode Menu" of the HDS, select "Electronic Steering Lock Replacement", and then Follow the on-screen instructions in HDS to proceed with the registration process. Verify that the system operates properly with the Honda Smart Key.

HDS "Does the DLC cable have a 3-pin or 5-pin DLC adapter attached?" and select "NO". Check the "Is the HDS equipped with a one-push start system?" and select "YES". Operate the ENGINE START STOP switch according to the HDS display. Confirm "Ignition switch was not turned on" in HDS and press ENTER. Select "Registration" from the HDS "Test Mode Menu", select "Smart Power Control Integrated Unit Replacement", and then Follow the on-screen instructions in HDS to proceed with the registration process. Verify that the system operates properly with the Honda Smart Key.
